« All Events

  • This event has passed.

2026 Community Celebration (OPEN TO ALL)

March 6 @ 5:00 pm - 8:00 pm
  • « Our Gender Lens: Understanding the WaWF Approach (MEMBERS ONLY)
  • Let’s Talk: Becoming a Member (OPEN TO ALL) »

Washington Women’s Foundation (WaWF) is excited to invite you to the 2026 Community Celebration on Friday, March 6th at the Georgetown Ballroom.

Join us as we celebrate 30 years of philanthropy, partnership, and collective impact. Our special anniversary event honors members, grantees, and community partners whose dedication helps advance equity and justice across Washington State.

This milestone celebration is both a reflection and a turning point. As we honor three decades of shared work, we also look ahead to a new direction launching in 2026.We are deepening our commitment to women and girls, centering their leadership and lived experiences, and investing in collective solutions that will strengthen communities for generations to come.

Come be a part of this anniversary event that highlights the powerful weaving of relationships and collective action that has shaped our past and will guide our future.

Event timeline and details:

  • Doors open at 5:00PM
  • More information to come!

This event is free and open to all WaWF members, former members, guests, grantees, community members, and the public. If you are curious about what we do at WaWF, this is a terrific opportunity to get to know us better.

Click here to register for the 2026 Community Celebration!

Gratitude to our sponsors:
